---
pagetitle: "Lukas A. Grahl"
description: "PhD student in Finance and Economics at Aarhus University."
---

<div class="home-hero">
  <div class="home-photo-wrap">
    <img class="home-photo" src="images/portrait.jpg" alt="Portrait of Lukas A. Grahl">
  </div>

  <div class="home-copy">
    <p class="eyebrow">PhD student in Finance and Economics · Aarhus University</p>
    <h1>Lukas A. Grahl</h1>

    <p class="home-lead">
      I am a PhD student at the Department of Economics and Business Economics at Aarhus University.
      My research lies at the intersection of household finance and behavioural finance, with a focus
      on decision-making under ambiguity and uncertainty.
    </p>

    <p>
      I am particularly interested in how investors form beliefs, process information, and adjust their
      portfolios over time. Outside research, I enjoy running, cooking, rowing, and analogue photography.
    </p>

    <nav class="home-links" aria-label="Profile links">
      <a href="research.html">Research</a>
      <a href="cv.html">CV</a>
      <a href="mailto:lukas.grahl@amkat.de">Email</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/lukasgrahl">GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/lukasgrahl">LinkedIn</a>
    </nav>
  </div>
</div>
